---
name: RFC
about: Propose an architectural direction before implementation
title: "RFC: "
labels:
  - enhancement
  - type:rfc
---

## Problem

What architectural limitation or decision point does this RFC address?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the target shape at a high level.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches were considered, and why are they weaker?

## Constraints

Call out compatibility, migration, performance, operational, or provider/backend constraints.

## Cleanup / Consolidation Impact

What existing code paths, assumptions, or duplicated implementations should go away if this RFC is adopted?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The target architecture is explicit enough to implement against
- [ ] Migration and rollback expectations are clear
- [ ] Open questions are called out

## Validation Plan

How will we prove the direction works before broad rollout?
